channel.title: Egypt on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Egypt on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Tulli Papyrus: Claims and Controversies
item.description:
The Tulli Papyrus is purportedly an Egyptian papyrus from the reign of Thutmose III, with claims originating from Tiffany Thayer in the Fortean Society magazine Doubt. Boris de Rachewiltz claimed to have found a papyrus document describing “flying saucers” and provided a translation. However, Rachewiltz later stated he had not seen the papyrus himself and based his translation on notes taken by Alberto Tulli. Many, including ufologists and those involved in the Condon Report, have considered the papyrus to be a hoax, possibly plagiarized from other texts.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tulli_Papyrus
